author: Elon Musk
quote: There are just times when something is important enough, you believe it enough, that you do it in spite of fear.
source: Interview with Sam Altman, Y Combinator, 2016 (verified by Snopes)

author: Marc Andreessen
source: The Wall Street Journal, essay title, 20 Aug 2011

author: Andrew Ng
source: Stanford GSB talk and subsequent keynotes, 2017+

author: Ben Horowitz
quote: There are no silver bullets for this, only lead bullets.
source: The Hard Thing About Hard Things, 2014

author: Reid Hoffman
quote: If you're not embarrassed by the first version of your product, you've launched too late.
source: Widely attributed to Reid Hoffman (LinkedIn co-founder), repeated in his own talks
